title: Candidate card
description: A SOURCE-stage candidate surfaced for screening - the unit the deterministic gate and bear-case evaluation consume. A card is a proposal, not an admission; most cards are rejected.

proposed_node.description: Bottleneck-graph node this name is proposed against.

proposed_role.description: How the name relates to the chokepoint: direct beneficiary, second-order, adjacent, or satellite.

why_fit.description: One-paragraph case for why the card fits the node.

evidence.description: Dated, tiered facts supporting the card.

known_risks.description: The strongest case against, stated up front.

missing_info.description: What a dated source could not confirm.

evidence.description: Mirror of evidence.schema.json (embedded so this schema validates without an external resolver).
